note: Five women-entrepreneur and small-business grant programs Amanda is tracking toward the studio launch. Stages follow Salesforce defaults: Prospecting, Qualification, Proposal, Application Submitted, Decision. Deadlines are firm except where noted.

opportunities.name: PA Womens Business Center — Aspire Grant 2027
opportunities.eligibility_note: PA-resident woman entrepreneur, business plan required, two-year financial projection required. Amanda meets all stated criteria.
opportunities.last_activity_summary: Downloaded the 2027 application package. Started the business-plan attachment.
open_tasks: Finish two-year financial projection (Excel template in Box folder).
Secure two letters of support (Maribel Santos and one community member, not yet asked).
Upload IRS Schedule C from 2025 (already in Box).

opportunities.name: Berks County Community Foundation — Women in Arts Microgrant
opportunities.eligibility_note: Berks County resident, arts-based business, under $100k annual revenue. Amanda submitted on 2026-09-12.
opportunities.last_activity_summary: Received automated acknowledgment of submission. No decision yet.
open_tasks: Watch for award announcement around the Foundation's December board meeting (no specific date set yet, typically second Tuesday of December).

opportunities.name: Reading Beautification Coalition — Storefront Activation Grant
opportunities.match_terms: 1:1 match required; Amanda must show $15,000 in equity / committed funding from other sources.
opportunities.eligibility_note: Business must occupy a vacant Reading or West Reading storefront within 12 months of award. Wyomissing storefronts are technically out of jurisdiction; one of the three Zillow shortlist candidates is in West Reading and would qualify.
opportunities.last_activity_summary: Sent intake email to program coordinator Marcus Reilly. Awaiting reply.
open_tasks: Confirm which of the three shortlisted spaces would satisfy the jurisdiction rule (West Reading address: 624 Penn Avenue).
Build the match-funding evidence package (Studio Fund balance + Alpaca + crypto if needed).

opportunities.name: SBA Women's Business Ownership — Targeted Microloan
opportunities.eligibility_note: Microloan, not a grant. Interest 6.5% to 8.5%, 6-year term. Amanda would need a business plan and personal financial statement.
opportunities.last_activity_summary: Reviewed SBA program page. No action since.
open_tasks: Decide whether a $35k loan is on the table or off. Discuss with Maribel on Oct 20.

opportunities.name: Eileen Fisher Women-Owned Business Grant 2027
opportunities.eligibility_note: National competition. Two-year-old business minimum. Amanda's instruction business will hit two years in October 2027. She is right at the threshold and would be eligible only if she counts the October 2025 start date. This is the longest-shot opportunity and the highest dollar value.
opportunities.last_activity_summary: Bookmarked the program page. Joined the email list.
open_tasks: Decide whether to allocate prep time toward this in Q1 2027 or defer to the next cycle.
